name: rldyour-rules
description: Инженерные правила качества, architecture, deps, gates и ADR. EN: Quality-first engineering rules.

interface.longDescription: Правила Codex для quality-first engineering, architecture, deps, gates и ADR policy. EN: This plugin defines the owner's engineering rules for Codex. It provides automatic skills for quality-first implementation, architecture boundaries, implementation discipline, dependency and compatibility policy, verification gates, project instruction documentation for Codex AGENTS.md and Claude Code .claude/CLAUDE.md, agent-only file policy, and explicit ry-rules-review. The rules are advisory-first but non-negotiable for hard bans such as hacks, temporary workarounds, swallowed errors, secrets, and fake checks. User-facing conversation stays Russian; repository artifacts stay English.
defaultPrompt: Используй $quality-first-engineering: держи качество. EN: quality-first coding.
Используй $architecture-boundaries: проверь placement. EN: architecture boundaries.
Используй $ry-rules-review: аудит diff по правилам. EN: rules review.
